title: PDF Export to export whole Table
excerpt: When using the export to PDF feature form dashboards, it only shows the part of the table in the table widget on show - not all the data in the table, need to either auto expand the widget size to the data table or have …

posts.author: LeeDrury (Lee Drury)
posts.cookedHtml: When using the export to PDF feature form dashboards, it only shows the part of the table in the table widget on show - not all the data in the table, need to either auto expand the widget size to the data table or have the PDF export add all the table automatically.

posts.author: idoputer (ido puterkovski)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Lee. did you manage to solve this problem?

posts.author: LeeDrury (Lee Drury)
posts.cookedHtml: Nope, haven’t looked at it for ages - would be really useful, been taking screenshots instead for now.

posts.author: debbieg (Debbie Gane)
posts.cookedHtml: This issue, coupled with the lack of word wrapping in the table, means that when I export status reports to PDF, half the information is missing. This is really frustrating Did anyone else find a way around this?
